name: Migration Planner
description: Plan code or system migrations with step-by-step strategies

agents.name: Migration Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze the current system and target state
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the current system architecture, dependencies, and pain points. Define the target state. Identify breaking changes, data migration needs, and rollback strategies.

agents.name: Migration Planner
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a phased migration plan with: pre-migration checklist, step-by-step migration phases, data migration strategy, testing requirements per phase, rollback procedures, timeline, and risk mitigation. Include a go/no-go decision framework.

author: agentfactory
